description: Slow DB queries cascade into elevated compute latency. Multi-tier reasoning REQUIRED: the recommendation must show the agent recognized BOTH tiers are involved. DB->compute cascade. query_cache_optimization is the canonical fix. pool_sizing and replica_adjustment were defensible alternatives but the gold's primary action is query+index optimization plus read replicas.
action_category_rationale: Three defensible categories: query_cache_optimization (fix the slow queries), pool_sizing (fix the connection bottleneck), replica_adjustment (add read replicas to absorb load).
